nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql: SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator, ea.started_at, ea.frozen_at, ea.total_marks, ea.status FROM revaluation_request rr JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND ea.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea.is_active = TRUE AND ea.frozen_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - working_day_offset(ea.script_assignment.assigned_at, 3, academic_year) ORDER BY ea.frozen_at ASC LIMIT 200;
